context.label: Before the Battle of Endor outcome

content.fact: Before Endor, the Rebel Alliance has not yet become the New Republic.
content.injection: Before the Battle of Endor outcome, do not refer to the New Republic as an active government unless the story is explicitly post-Endor or diverged. Use this as a background rule only; narrower active era/source cards should override it.

entries.title: No Immediate Galactic Peace After Endor

content.fact: Even after Endor, Legends continuity does not become instantly peaceful or politically settled.
content.injection: After Endor, treat victory as a transition, not an instant resolution of Imperial power, civil war, or galactic trauma.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: Vader Redeemed and Anakin Dies.
